compiled_state.title: Write SC3 structural boundary test: preplanning SKILL.md refuses when External Dependencies block is missing
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## Task Description
Create tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc3-preplanning.sh. The test asserts that preplanning SKILL.md contains: (1) a section documenting the External Dependencies block reader, (2) a refusal diagnostic when the External Dependencies block is missing or incomplete, and (3) the handling=user_manual → manual:awaiting_user tag assignment.

Follows the same grep-based structural assertion pattern as test-preplanning-sc-contradiction-check.sh. Uses source .../tests/lib/assert.sh and print_summary. Must fail (RED) until story 9c89-7d9f adds the required SKILL.md text.

## Given / When / Then
- Given: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md exists
- When: the test checks for the SC3 block-missing refusal text
- Then: the test fails (RED) until story 9c89-7d9f adds the refusal clause

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] File tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc3-preplanning.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc3-preplanning.sh
- [ ] Test test_external_dep_block_reader_section_exists asserts the block reader section is present in preplanning SKILL.md
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc3-preplanning.sh 2>&1 | grep -q test_external_dep_block_reader_section_exists
- [ ] Test test_preplanning_refusal_when_block_missing asserts refusal diagnostic text is in SKILL.md
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc3-preplanning.sh 2>&1 | grep -q test_preplanning_refusal_when_block_missing
- [ ] Test test_manual_awaiting_user_tag_assignment asserts user_manual → manual:awaiting_user in SKILL.md
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc3-preplanning.sh 2>&1 | grep -q test_manual_awaiting_user_tag_assignment
- [ ] Test exits non-zero (RED) when run against current SKILL.md before 9c89-7d9f is implemented
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc3-preplanning.sh; echo exit:$?
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_preplanning_refusal_when_block_missing] for plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_preplanning_refusal_when_block_missing\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test is auto-discovered by tests/skills/run-skill-bash-tests.sh
  Verify: ls $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc3-preplanning.sh
